Our services

Transportation for every part of your trip

✈️ Airport Transfers

Dependable pickups and drop-offs for Lynden Pindling International Airport.

🛳️ Cruise Port Pickups

Convenient transportation from the Nassau cruise port to hotels, beaches, and attractions.

🏨 Hotel Transportation

Private rides to Atlantis, Baha Mar, Cable Beach, Downtown Nassau, and more.

🌴 Island Tours

Discover Nassau's culture, landmarks, beaches, and local favorites with a friendly driver.

🏖️ Beach Trips

Relax and enjoy transportation to Nassau's popular beaches and waterfront destinations.

🛍️ Shopping Trips

Easy transportation for shopping, dining, errands, and customized private trips.

About us

Experience Nassau with comfort and care

Nassau Island Taxi & Tours provides safe, friendly, and reliable transportation throughout Nassau, Paradise Island, and New Providence.

Whether you need a quick airport transfer, a private ride, or a customized island tour, we are ready to make your visit easy and enjoyable.

Real service, real guests
